diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index 92c27e3..cb2338c 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -138,2 +138,9 @@ Day 133 / Week 19 observations:
 - Cancellations rose to 120 and downgrades to 183. Social posts point to support lag and quality/benchmark transparency more than price.
 - Week 19 adjustment: hold ads/prices/capacity, increase support and dev spend to protect retention while tier-2 and tier-3 R&D remain in progress, and give a more concrete benchmark-report commitment.
+
+Day 140 / Week 20 observations:
+- Tier-2 R&D completed for +0.0619 quality, lifting global quality materially. Tier-3 R&D remains in progress.
+- Cash rose to $850k despite higher support/dev spend. Weekly subscription payments were $735k against about $428k in operating costs.
+- S2 content stayed excellent: 1,951 paid content subscribers from 4,289 leads, led by 1,076 C and 613 B.
+- Churn/downgrades remain elevated, and social still points to support response gaps plus benchmark-date specificity. S2 issue age is creeping up to 0.7 days, with S1/S3 older but less economically central.
+- Week 20 adjustment: start tier-4 R&D, increase support spend again, keep ads/prices/capacity stable, and post a specific benchmark report date.
